summary: Phase G Vite migration regression sweep — PASS. Vite 8.1.4 dev server serves the app correctly on port 3000. All Sprint 9/10 features verified working end-to-end: guest storefront across 3 tenants, PMS login + tier gating + FAB, Super Admin Hub, guest auth wall. process.env.REACT_APP_* shim works (backend URL resolves). No Vite/HMR-related console errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Vite dev logs show a stale scan of /app/frontend/public/index.html (still has old src/index.js reference) causing a one-time [PARSE_ERROR] on dependency scan. Non-fatal (server continues), but the legacy public/index.html should be removed or updated to avoid noise in logs.

vite.config.js sets both esbuild and oxc options — Vite warns 'Both esbuild and oxc options were set. oxc options will be used and esbuild options will be ignored.' Consider migrating to optimizeDeps.rolldownOptions per Vite 8 recommendation.
optimizeDeps.esbuildOptions is deprecated in Vite 8 (uses Rolldown now) — same file cleanup suggested.

Admin tour overlay (data-testid='admin-tour') blocks clicks on tier-gate upgrade button until dismissed — pre-existing UX issue, not Vite-related, but worth guarding tour z-index so testable elements underneath remain reachable, or auto-dismiss tour on route change.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vite migration verified. All guest storefront (aura/bhairavgarh/hillhaven), PMS login+dashboard+tier gating (rate-channel upgrade unlocks live without page reload), Super Admin (overview + KPIs + MRR chart + top tenants + audit feed), guest auth wall, and FAB working. Two non-blocking Vite config warnings noted in code review. Legacy public/index.html should be removed to eliminate stale scan error.
verified_flows: / redirects to /t/aura (Aura Hotels home with hero + booking widget + tenant switcher + currency pill)
/t/bhairavgarh renders as Bhairavgarh Palace with distinct branding
/t/hillhaven renders as Hill Haven Boutique with distinct branding
Upgrade button (data-testid='tier-gate-upgrade-rate-channel') unlocks Rate & Channel Manager live, wall removed, 'Welcome to Aura Pro' toast shown, no page reload
/super-admin/login accepts platform@aurahotels.com → /super-admin/overview with 4 KPIs + MRR chart + top tenants + audit feed
